mapper.sql: id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, status_id, user_id, real_name, gender, grade, school, province_id, city_id, district_id, address, parent_name, parent_mobile
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from student_profile
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into student_profile (id, gmt_create, gmt_modified, status_id, user_id, real_name, gender, grade, school, province_id, city_id, district_id, address, parent_name, parent_mobile, remark) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{grade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into student_profile
id,
gmt_create,
gmt_modified,
status_id,
user_id,
real_name,
gender,
grade,
school,
province_id,
city_id,
district_id,
address,
parent_name,
parent_mobile,
remark,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{grade,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{parentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{parentMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update student_profile
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
gmt_create = #{record.gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
gmt_modified = #{record.gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status_id = #{record.statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
real_name = #{record.realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{record.gender,jdbcType=TINYINT},
grade = #{record.grade,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
school = #{record.school,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
province_id = #{record.provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
city_id = #{record.cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
district_id = #{record.districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
address = #{record.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_name = #{record.parentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_mobile = #{record.parentMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update student_profile set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_create = #{record.gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gmt_modified = #{record.gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status_id = #{record.statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, real_name = #{record.realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{record.gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, grade = #{record.grade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, school = #{record.school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, province_id = #{record.provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, city_id = #{record.cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, district_id = #{record.districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, address = #{record.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_name = #{record.parentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_mobile = #{record.parentMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update student_profile set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_create = #{record.gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gmt_modified = #{record.gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status_id = #{record.statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, real_name = #{record.realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{record.gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, grade = #{record.grade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, school = #{record.school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, province_id = #{record.provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, city_id = #{record.cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, district_id = #{record.districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, address = #{record.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_name = #{record.parentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_mobile = #{record.parentMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update student_profile
gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status_id = #{statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT},
grade = #{grade,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
school = #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
province_id = #{provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
city_id = #{cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
district_id = #{districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_name = #{parentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_mobile = #{parentMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update student_profile set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status_id = #{statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, grade = #{grade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, school = #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, province_id = #{provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, city_id = #{cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, district_id = #{districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_name = #{parentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_mobile = #{parentMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update student_profile set gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status_id = #{statusId,jdbcType=TINYINT}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, real_name = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, grade = #{grade,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, school = #{school,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, province_id = #{provinceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, city_id = #{cityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, district_id = #{districtId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_name = #{parentName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_mobile = #{parentMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
